features: 🌍 Country selection with governance and socio-economic element suggestions (97 countries, 11 regional seas)
🔬 Evidence-based strength, confidence, and temporal lag across 620+ curated connections
📚 SES Knowledge Base expanded to 30 contexts with 620 scientifically validated connections
🏝️ 6 insular ecosystem contexts added (Caribbean, Pacific atoll, Indian Ocean, Arctic, Baltic, Atlantic islands)
🧊 Arctic island, Atlantic estuary/coast, Baltic rocky coast ecosystem contexts
🔗 Graphical SES network builder module for visual CLD construction
📖 Tutorial system module with guided walkthroughs
🔧 Universal Excel loader for flexible SES model import
🧠 ML model registry and text embeddings infrastructure
🎓 DTU dynamics integration with Boolean network analysis

critical.issue: Subscript out of bounds crash when removing unconnected elements
critical.impact: App crashed when user selected 'Remove unconnected and continue'
critical.resolution: Remap connection indices by name lookup after element removal; added bounds checking in build_adjacency_matrices

critical.issue: 28 invalid DAPSIWRM flow directions in knowledge database
critical.impact: Erroneous connection suggestions skipping framework levels (D->P, A->S, R->S)
critical.resolution: Routed all connections through proper intermediate elements per DAPSIWRM rules

critical.issue: Translation file write permission denied on server
critical.impact: App failed to start after deployment
critical.resolution: Set group-writable permissions on translations directory during deployment

improvements.issue: Orphan element reference in indian_ocean_island context
improvements.resolution: Fixed element name to match existing driver

migration_notes: No breaking changes - all changes are backward-compatible
Knowledge database version bumped to 1.1 (structural fixes)
Country governance database is a new feature, no migration needed
developer_notes: Run scripts/audit_kb.R to validate knowledge base after any KB changes
Connection indices are now remapped by name after element removal
build_adjacency_matrices has bounds checking as safety net
deployment_notes: Ensure translations/ directory has group-write permission (chmod 775)
Translation cache (_merged_translations.json) regenerates on first startup
Full server restart recommended for new modules
